# AGENTS.md

# preserve-tenant-export-isolation

Keep export behavior while preventing cross-tenant order leakage

## Goal
Preserve tenant isolation in order exports

## Background
Order export tests can pass when fixtures only contain one tenant, while mixed-tenant proof vectors expose missing tenant filtering.

## Plan
- Inspect order export filtering and existing export tests
- Apply tenantId filtering before rendering export rows
- Add regression coverage with mixed-tenant paid orders
- Run proof check that verifies tenant isolation

## Scope
Included paths: package.json, scripts/**, src/exports/**, tests/exports/**
Excluded paths: none

## Tool Policy
Shell allowlist: npm test -- exports, npm run lint, npm run proof:check
Shell denylist: none
Network: deny
Network allowlist: none
Secrets: deny
Secret allowlist: none
Filesystem read: package.json, scripts/**, src/exports/**, tests/exports/**
Filesystem write: src/exports/**, tests/exports/**
Filesystem deny: none
Approval required for: dependency_change, network_access, scope_expansion

## Policies
- must_not no-dependency-change: New runtime dependencies may not be added.
- must preserve-paid-order-export-behavior-must-be-preserved: Paid order export behavior must be preserved.
- must exports-include-only-orders-whose-tenantid-matches-the-requested-tenant: Exports include only orders whose tenantId matches the requested tenant
- must draft-orders-remain-excluded: Draft orders remain excluded
- must_not leak-orders-from-another-tenant: Leak orders from another tenant

## Checks
- npm-test-exports (required): npm test -- exports
- npm-run-lint (required): npm run lint
- npm-run-proof-check (required): npm run proof:check

## Acceptance
- Requested tenant paid orders remain exported
- Other tenant paid orders are excluded
- Draft orders remain excluded
Review: Explain tenant isolation behavior.
Review: List changed files.
Review: Note risks.
